query: SELECT p.store_id, p.category_id, pc.name as cat_name FROM products p JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = p.category_id WHERE LOWER(pc.name) LIKE '%deli%' LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT p.store_id, p.category_id, pc.name as cat_name FROM products p JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = p.category_id WHERE LOWER(pc.name) LIKE '%deli%' LIMIT 1;
